calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-13-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Michael S. Hunt, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Citibank (South Dakota) N.A.
Ramona Aragon, litigation analyst for Citibank (South Dakota) N.A., was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Calvin J. Womble.
Default entered on December 12, 2006.
Doe defendants dismissed on December 12, 2006.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Citibank (South Dakota) N.A., and against the Defaulted Defendant Calvin J. Womble as follows:

Damages/Principal - $27,747.44.
Costs $360.00, for a total of $28,107.44.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
